message:
feat(runtime,doctor): expand program lifecycle and process subscription APIs

- program.rs: +242 lines adding structured program lifecycle management
  with state machine transitions, restart policies, and health monitoring
- process_subscription.rs: +70 lines extending process subscription with
  filtered event streams and batch notification support
- capture.rs: +53 lines improving capture workflow error handling and
  retry logic for degraded environments
- Beads tracker sync with updated issue priorities

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
